data.content: Shipment review approved. Commit 3b4ca4f1d2f8 is live on main. CI (Coverage Badge run 23744660324) passed green. The fix replaces the fixed-width flex layout in PoolAgentRow with a CSS grid that sizes the agent-identity column from rendered content, preventing multi-pill agents from overlapping the number input. A layout contract test guards against regression. No invariants to check; no regressions detected.
